subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose Name the gate of heaven was opened and the people of creation hastened unto the Dayspring of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا من باسمک فتح باب السماء و سرع اهل الانشاء الی مطلع الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for prosperity
